values.fullName: Other - All other churn protection requests outside of this list - must go through special approval process
This is a CC or Wire account
Any sort of response%21 %28lead or client has gone cold%29
Build a Rapport %28current or advanced negotiation stages%29
Expansion %28get this circulating among a larger audience%29
The template is not applicable to the client
Yes%2C the client had accepted it
P0 %28Contingent on a deal for current month%29
Insufficient information on pricing%2C features or terms
No address on sold to and bill to contacts
Showcase new data to a client
